title: FlatList Render
description: Render a large list of text items efficiently using the FlatList component.
problemStatement:
Efficiency matters! Given an array `const names = ['Apples', 'Bananas', 'Cherries']`, use a `<FlatList>` to render each name inside a `Text` element.

**Requirement:** Pass the `data` and `renderItem` props. Provide a string as the `keyExtractor` using the name itself.
hints: `FlatList` only renders items currently visible on the screen, making it great for long lists.
expectedOutput: A scrollable list of fruit names
